name: Nantucket Cranberry Pie
recipeIngredient: 3/4 Cup (1 1/2 Sticks) Melted and Cooled Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Put the chopped cranberries, walnuts, and 1/2 cup sugar in a buttered 10-inch pie plate or springform pan.
3. Mix 2 large eggs, 3/4 cup melted and cooled butter, 1 cup sugar, 1 cup flour, 1/4 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon almond extract until the batter is smooth.
4. Pour the batter over the cranberry walnut mixture.
5. Bake in the middle of the oven for 40 minutes, or until a tester comes out clean.
